attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks on final climb (3.5km+ from finish), particularly effective when committing early rather than waiting for final kilometers. Shows descending aggression when establishing gaps over mountain summits.
team_tactics: Groupama-FDJ provides protected climber support but shows structural weakness in extreme conditions, with multiple protected riders distanced simultaneously. Limited high-mountain domestique strength compared to top GC teams.
terrain_preference: Sustained high-mountain climbs in moderate temperatures. Excels on long alpine ascents (Tourmalet, Hautacam) where consistent climbing rhythm rewards durability. Descending skills allow him to maintain or extend summit advantages.
vulnerability: Extreme heat conditions repeatedly expose weakness—distanced early on climbs in hot weather across multiple Tours (2021 Sault, 2023 repeated instances). Late-race fragility threatens podium ambitions as shown by penultimate stage crash dropping him from top-10.
key_patterns: Heat sensitivity: distanced early on climbs in extreme temperatures across 2021 and 2023 Tours (3 observations)
Long-range attacks: commits 3.5-35km from finish rather than explosive final-km accelerations (2 observations)
Consistent top-10 progression: built first Tour top-10 through steady climbing, jumped positions late-race (2 observations)
Late-race vulnerability: crash and form drops on final stages threaten otherwise strong GC campaigns (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: demonstrated Tour leadership credentials in 2023 Paris-Nice forcing Pogačar to work, but subsequent heat-related struggles and crash-induced fragility suggest ceiling remains top-10 rather than podium contender
